ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "legal_description" TEXT /* Legal description of the property */,
  "account_number" INTEGER /* Account number assigned to the property */,
  "local_value" TEXT /* Local assessed value of the property */,
  "ptad_value" TEXT /* PTAD assessed value of the property */,
  "ratio" TEXT /* Ratio of local value to PTAD value */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was last assessed */,
  "parcel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the parcel */,
  " GIS_coordinates" TEXT /* GIS coordinates for mapping purposes */,
  "jurisdiction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the jurisdiction where the property is located */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood where the property is located */,
  "school_district" TEXT /* Name of the school district serving the property */,
  "zoning_classification" TEXT /* Zoning classification of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_jurisdiction_id FOREIGN KEY ("jurisdiction_id") REFERENCES jurisdictions ("jurisdiction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_account_number FOREIGN KEY ("account_number") REFERENCES jurisdictions ("jurisdiction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessors" (
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the assessor */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the assessor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the assessor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the assessor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the assessor belongs to */,
  "certification_level" TEXT /* Certification level of the assessor (e.g., IAAO, CAE) */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience as an assessor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jurisdictions" (
  "jurisdiction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each jurisdiction */,
  "jurisdiction_name" TEXT /* Name of the jurisdiction (e.g., city, county) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the jurisdiction is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the jurisdiction */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the jurisdiction */,
  "fax_number" TEXT /* Fax number for the jurisdiction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("jurisdiction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being assessed */,
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessor performing the assessment */,
  "assessment_action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken (e.g., update, review) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Description of changes made to the property assessment */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the changes made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_logs_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_logs_assessor_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessor_id") REFERENCES assessors ("assessor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "value_adjustments" (
  "adjustment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value adjustment */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property for which adjustment is made */,
  "adjustment_type" TEXT /* Type of adjustment (e.g., increase, decrease) */,
  "adjustment_value" TEXT /* Value of the adjustment */,
  "adjustment_date" TEXT /* Date when the adjustment was made */,
  "reason_for_adjustment" TEXT /* Reason for the adjustment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjustment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_value_adjustments_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_rates" (
  "tax_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax rate */,
  "jurisdiction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the jurisdiction to which the tax rate applies */,
  "rate" TEXT /* Tax rate percentage for the jurisdiction */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the rate became effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the rate expires */,
  "tax_type" TEXT /* Type of tax (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_rates_jurisdiction_id FOREIGN KEY ("jurisdiction_id") REFERENCES jurisdictions ("jurisdiction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_records" (
  "tax_record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being taxed */,
  "tax_rate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tax rate applied */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the tax is calculated */,
  "calculated_tax" TEXT /* Calculated tax amount */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the tax payment (e.g., paid, pending) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the tax payment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_records_tax_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("tax_rate_id") REFERENCES tax_rates ("tax_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_records_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appeals" (
  "appeal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appeal */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being appealed */,
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessor responsible for the appeal */,
  "appeal_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the appeal */,
  "appeal_date" TEXT /* Date the appeal was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the appeal (e.g., pending, resolved) */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the appeal */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the appeal was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appeal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appeals_assessor_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessor_id") REFERENCES assessors ("assessor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appeals_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., assessor, admin, viewer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supervisor (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the notification is sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., assessment update, appeal submission) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "GIS_data" (
  "GIS_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GIS record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property associated with the GIS data */,
  "parcel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parcel associated with the GIS data */,
  "GIS_coordinates" TEXT /* GIS coordinates for mapping purposes */,
  "zoning_map" TEXT /* Zoning map data for the property */,
  "flood_zone_map" TEXT /* Flood zone map data for the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("GIS_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_GIS_data_parcel_id FOREIGN KEY ("parcel_id") REFERENCES properties ("parcel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_GIS_data_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)
